verses.1: A Psalm of David. The earth is the LORD’S, and all it contains, The world, and those who live in it.
verses.2: For He has founded it upon the seas And established it upon the rivers.
verses.3: Who may ascend onto the hill of the LORD? And who may stand in His holy place?
verses.4: One who has clean hands and a pure heart, Who has not lifted up his soul to deceit And has not sworn deceitfully.
verses.5: He will receive a blessing from the LORD And righteousness from the God of his salvation.
verses.6: This is the generation of those who seek Him, Who seek Your face— even Jacob. Selah
verses.7: Lift up your heads, you gates, And be lifted up, you ancient doors, That the King of glory may come in!
verses.8: Who is the King of glory? The LORD strong and mighty, The LORD mighty in battle.
verses.9: Lift up your heads, you gates, And lift them up, you ancient doors, That the King of glory may come in!
verses.10: Who is this King of glory? The LORD of armies, He is the King of glory. Selah
